svg.text: CRO Browser Agent - Data Flow Pipeline
Complete CRO Analysis Flow: observe → reason → act

g.text: AGENT LOOP (observe → reason → act) - Max 10 Steps
1. CLI parses URL and options → 2. Browser loads page, dismisses cookies → 3. DOMExtractor builds classified tree
4. CROAgent initializes with tools → 5. Agent loop: observe (re-extract) → reason (GPT-4o) → act (execute tool)
6. Heuristic engine runs 10 rules, detects business type → 7. Post-process: dedupe, prioritize, generate hypotheses
8. Output in console, markdown, or JSON format → Final CROAnalysisResult with scores, insights, and A/B test specs
H001-H002: CTA issues (vague text, below fold)
H007-H008: Value prop issues (unclear, too long)
